name: alpha_001_quality_reversal
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_eps, eps))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 9)))))

name: alpha_002_quality_value_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_cashflow_op, cashflow_op))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(close, 1), 7)))))

name: alpha_003_margin_revision_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(ebit, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_sales, sales))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(debt, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 7)))))

name: alpha_004_fcf_quality_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(capex, assets))), rank(subtract(est_fcf, capex))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(close, 1), 6)))))

name: alpha_005_analyst_quality_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, earnings_certainty_rank_derivative))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 8)))))

name: alpha_006_profit_stability_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_netprofit, est_netdebt))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(debt, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(close, 1), 8)))))
